hero.title: Mogu.
hero.lede: Soft, velvety acoustic panels grown from mycelium and upcycled textile residue. A 3D-shaped surface engineered to maximise absorption, brought to Denmark by Beyond Rational.

hero_note: Surfaces shown are an indicative rendering of the finish range. Final samples and the full colour range on request.

points.title: Mycelium, not foam
points.body: Panels are grown from mycelium combined with upcycled textile residue — a soft, foam-like material that reaches its final shape through biological growth, not chemical processing.

points.title: Shaped for absorption
points.body: A velvety, three-dimensional surface is engineered specifically to absorb the frequencies of speech — tuned for offices, meeting rooms and homes alike.

points.title: Circular by design
points.body: VOC-free and 100% circular, with a screw-less fixing system for easy mounting and removal. Naturally white by default, with a wider colour range available.

rows.value: Tuned to the frequencies of speech

gallery_head.body: Images are managed in the CMS — add or replace them at /admin.

cta.lede: Want to hear when Mogu is ready? Send us a line and we'll keep you posted.
